tagline: Trusted Pool Cleaning & Repair Experts Serving Los Angeles

hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves the Family Touch
hero.subheadline: Pop's Pool Service blends old-school hospitality with modern precision. We show up every single visit, send you photo reports, and keep your water crystal clear — so all you have to do is enjoy the swim.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> a Family That Cares
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to emergency repairs, Pop's handles every aspect of pool care so you never have to worry about your backyard oasis.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough weekly and bi-weekly cleaning with skimming, vacuuming, and brushing. You get a detailed photo report with water chemistry after every single visit.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Year-round water chemistry testing, chemical balancing, and system checks that keep your pool in peak condition through every season.

cards.title: Algae Removal & Green Pool Cleanup
cards.description: Got a green pool nightmare? We restore neglected, murky pools to crystal-clear condition with targeted chemical treatment — often in 48-72 hours.

cards.title: Pool Repair
cards.description: Leaks, broken pumps, plumbing issues, electrical problems — we diagnose fast and fix it right. From leak detection to full equipment overhauls.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation and maintenance of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems to keep everything running efficiently and quietly.

cards.title: Safety Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive pool safety and compliance inspections that meet all LA County regulations and keep your swimmers protected.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Get Your Free Virtual Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll provide an honest, no-pressure quote — usually same day. No contracts, no commitments, no surprises.

steps.title: We Show Up. Every Time.
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule with our NO Skipped Stops guarantee. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — then we send you a full photo report.

steps.title: Just Dive In
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, swim-ready, and worry-free all year long. If you're ever not happy, we come back and make it right — free.

about.label: Why LA Trusts Pop's
about.headline: Old-School Hospitality, Modern Pool Care
about.description: Founded by Mark and Aaron, Pop's Pool Service is a family-owned operation rooted in the San Fernando Valley. With 15+ years of combined experience and over 500 happy customers, we treat every pool like it's our own. We send photo reports after every visit because we believe in total transparency — you see exactly what we did, your water chemistry numbers, and any recommendations. No guesswork, no shortcuts.

features.title: NO Skipped Stops. Period.
features.description: Other companies skip visits when they're overbooked. We guarantee service every single scheduled visit — rain or shine, holiday or not.

features.title: Photo Reports After Every Visit
features.description: You'll get an email with photos and full water chemistry details every time we service your pool. Total transparency, always.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees. If we're not the best, you're free to go.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts. Plus, get 50% off your first month.

guarantee.headline: Our "Perfect Pool" Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — completely free. We also guarantee NO skipped stops: every scheduled visit happens, every time. That's the Pop's way.

faqs.question: How quickly can Pop's start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day service. Call us at 818-824-8638 and we'll work with your timeline.

faqs.question: What are the photo reports I keep hearing about?
faqs.answer: After every single service visit, we email you a detailed report with photos of your pool, current pH balance, chemical levels, and any recommendations. You always know exactly what was done and how your pool looks.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during cleaning?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients give us gate access and we handle everything while you're out. Your photo report email lets you see everything we did, so you never miss a thing.

faqs.question: What does 'NO Skipped Stops' actually mean?
faqs.answer: It means we show up every single scheduled visit — guaranteed. Other companies skip stops when they're overbooked or short-staffed. At Pop's, your service date is locked in and we honor it every time.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Yes! We serve both residential and commercial pools across greater Los Angeles, including HOAs, apartment complexes, and business properties. We're DPH licensed (PR0315023) and fully insured.

testimonials.name: Tom Frenkel
testimonials.text: Serviced my pool that same day after fires and high winds damaged it. I've stuck with them ever since. Reliable, professional, and they actually care about doing the job right.

testimonials.name: Yoel K.
testimonials.text: Outstanding! Super knowledgeable. Finally explained why my pool kept going green and fixed it for good. These guys know their stuff inside and out.

testimonials.name: Collin Hertz
testimonials.text: Professionals. Arrive on time and don't nickel and dime you. Straightforward pricing, great communication, and my pool has never looked better.
